balance-amount: font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-top: 8px; letter-spacing: -0.5px; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
b-btn: flex: 1; height: 40px; border-radius: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
a-row: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--divider);
a-icon: width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: #fff;
a-amt: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1px;
